title: 3D Bundles
description: Tired of 2D Bundles? Well now you can have them 1 dimension higher!
body:
![3D Bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e259cd6d0b18393e249bf27fb53523bcf340c40.png)

## What does this change?

This resource pack changes every single bundle texture (except for the secret ones in the game files) to make it 3D!

## Does it also work before the _Bundles of Bravery_ update?

Yes but poorly, in the _Bundles of Bravery_ update, there is only one state of the bundle which is closed, before the update there were 2 states, opened and closed

## Who are you?

I, am steve! _meow meow amma cow_
